label: Telekinesis
description: Move objects at a distance with mind alone. Heft equals the rating in dots.

label: Possession
description: Inhabit a mortal body and act as that character. Target keeps memories on success.

label: Mortal Mask
description: The creature appears human to mundane senses. Defeated by Investigation versus Power + Finesse.

label: Innocuous
description: Witnesses overlook or rationalize the creature's presence until directly confronted.

label: Mind Speech
description: Project thoughts to one target within line of sight.

label: Wall Crawl
description: Move across vertical surfaces and ceilings at normal Speed.

label: Regeneration
description: Heal one bashing or lethal box per turn. Aggravated requires the creature's bane.

label: Frenzy
description: Loss of control. +2 to attack pools, -2 Defense, attacks the nearest living thing.

label: Materialize
description: Ephemeral being takes physical form, vulnerable to mundane attacks while material.

label: Phantasm
description: Create a vivid sensory illusion. Disbelief requires contested resolve.

label: Dread Aura
description: All within sight gain the Shaken Condition for the scene.

label: Awe
description: Witnesses are paralyzed with awe or terror for one turn.
